semantic.role: Test suite for view runtime layer resolution logic. Validates the behavior of resolveViewLayer and resolveEnabledViews under various configurations (env vars, config file settings).
responsibilities: Verify that resolveViewLayer returns the correct layer ID based on the SPINE_VIEW_LAYER environment variable when present.
Verify that resolveViewLayer reads the view-layer from a config file (spine.config.json) when the env var is absent.
Verify that resolveViewLayer falls back to the default layer when neither env var nor config specifies a layer.
Verify that resolveEnabledViews returns the appropriate set of enabled views based on the resolved layer.
outOfScope: Production runtime logic – this file only contains test cases, not runtime code.
Integration with external systems beyond temporary filesystem setup.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts per repository rules.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated regression coverage for the view layer selection mechanism that determines what views are available to users based on configuration and environment.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent change intent specific to this file; test suite maintains stability of view runtime resolution.
